Telegraph Poles in Areas With No Ducting

Full Fibre is being rolled out across the country, replacing the copper wire infrastructure which has been used since 1911. Fibre Optics is able to carry a far...

Ticket Office Consultation

Kidderminster Train Station has been included in the list of possible stations to see the closure of the ticket office by West Midlands Railways.

Misuse of Nitrous Oxide

Raising the awareness of the misuse of Nitrous Oxide and to urge the Government to review its guidelines on this potentially dangerous substance which too many...

Stop Lea Castle Quarry

Mark Garnier fully supports the local community and the campaign to STOP THE QUARRY at Lea Castle Farm. For full information on the local campaign Group and how...

Support for Park Home Residents

The Chancellor earlier this summer announced direct support for Energy costs for households. This support will be paid directly through Energy Suppliers and...

Domestic Building Works Consumer Protection Bill

Today Mark Garnier has presented his bill to end the scourge of rogue builders and will progress through the House of Commons, with its 2nd reading in November...
